about.title: Our Commitment
about.description: Since 1994, we have been selecting the finest natural ingredients for the cosmetic industry, perfumery and food industry. Our expertise and global network allow us to offer you exceptional products.

commitments.title: Our commitments.
commitments.feature1Desc: We select suppliers committed to sustainable and ethical practices.
commitments.feature2Desc: Every ingredient is traced from source to delivery to guarantee quality.
commitments.feature3Desc: COSMOS, ECOCERT, BIO, ISO 9001 — our products meet the highest standards.
commitments.feature4Desc: Our team of experts guides you in choosing your ingredients.
